findings.area: agenda row — tirsdag 7. juli 02:00, United States – Belgium
findings.issue: Second team name is truncated to just a flag with no text at all ('United States – 🇧🇪…') — Belgium's name isn't readable, only inferable from the flag.

findings.area: agenda row — tirsdag 7. juli 22:00, Switzerland – Colombia
findings.issue: Same pattern: 'Switzerland – 🇨🇴…' shows only the opponent's flag, no name text.

findings.area: agenda row — tirsdag 7. juli 02:00, United States – Belgium
findings.issue: Still truncates to 'United States – 🇧🇪 B…' — Belgium not fully readable even at the larger phone width.

findings.area: agenda row — tirsdag 7. juli 22:00, Switzerland – Colombia
findings.issue: Truncates to 'Switzerland – 🇨🇴 Col…' — Colombia not fully readable.

Stage titles truncate the finish town, e.g. 'Etappe 1 (lagtempo): Ba…' hides that the stage starts and ends in Barcelona, and 'Etappe 3 (fjell): Granolle…' hides the finish town Les Angles. Confirmed on desktop (900px) that the full text is 'Barcelona – Barcelona' and 'Granollers – Les Angles'.
Same truncation as at 375px, slightly less severe (a few more characters visible) but finish town still cut off.

notes: Norwegian-channel contract holds throughout: only NRK, TV 2 Play, NRK / TV2, and Viaplay appear as broadcasters at all three widths — no foreign broadcaster (ESPN/FOX/Sky) seen.
Flags and sport icons render correctly everywhere — no broken image icons or empty boxes.
Round labels (Åttedelsfinale, Kvartfinale) display correctly next to knockout fixtures.
No horizontal scroll or edge clipping observed at 375px; layout stays a single quiet column with generous spacing at all widths.
Header, day-group headings, 'Hva vi følger' disclosure, and footer (Oppdatert / Legg til i kalender) are all intact and aligned at every width.

The Brazil – Norway fixture (i morgen, 22:00) renders with bolder text than neighboring rows, consistent with the must-see accent for a Norwegian team, and it's the only row emphasized this way — restrained, not overused.

Placeholder bracket fixtures ('Round of 16 1 Winner – Round of 16 2 Winner') truncate identically to the named fixtures at 375/393px; not a real issue today since the names are generic placeholders, but the same truncation will apply once real team names replace them.

Could not visually confirm whether the Norway accent is implemented as a dot marker per the spec description or as bold text — resolution of the screenshots wasn't sufficient to distinguish a small dot glyph from font-weight change.
